file_insights.purpose: Task metadata and progress tracking for auto-claude workflow
key_changes: Status transitions: pending → completed for subtasks 2-1, 2-2, 2-3
Added structured notes and ISO 8601 timestamps to each completed subtask
Formatted JSON arrays and objects for consistency
file_insights.significance: Central coordination document for multi-phase integration test implementation

file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive documentation of integration test results and acceptance criteria validation
file_insights.significance: Deliverable artifact proving test completeness and quality

patterns_discovered.details: Status field paired with notes field and ISO 8601 timestamp for audit trail. Enables precise tracking of what work was done and when.
ServerGuard struct ensures process termination and temp directory cleanup even on test panic. Critical for preventing orphaned processes in parallel test runs.
Tests bind to port 0 (OS-assigned free port) rather than fixed port. Prevents conflicts in parallel execution and CI/CD environments.
Uses raw TCP sockets instead of HTTP client crates. Reduces dependency footprint and aligns with minimal-dependencies philosophy.
Consistent sections: Summary → Coverage → Results → Acceptance → Implementation → Conclusion. Enables automated parsing and uniform quality reporting.

gotchas_discovered.impact: Code must pass cargo fmt --check in addition to tests and clippy
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Fixed formatting, then verified full make check passes before documentation

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Timing Race Conditions in Port Allocation
gotchas_discovered.context: HTTP server startup in integration test
gotchas_discovered.impact: Server bind succeeds but connection attempts fail if listener not ready
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Added 200ms delay after port allocation to ensure TCP backlog is ready

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Orphaned Processes in Parallel Test Runs
gotchas_discovered.impact: Failed cleanup → orphaned bop serve processes consuming resources and ports
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implemented ServerGuard RAII pattern with explicit process::kill() on drop

gotchas_discovered.impact: Initial single-item arrays formatted on one line, breaking diffs for minor changes
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Reformatted all arrays to multi-line format for cleaner git history

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully completed subtask-2-3: created comprehensive result.md documenting the serve_smoke integration test, test outcomes, and acceptance criteria validation.
deliverables: Integration test serve_smoke.rs with RAII cleanup patterns
result.md report with test coverage and acceptance validation

recommendations.rationale: result.md structure (Summary → Coverage → Results → Acceptance → Implementation → Conclusion) proved effective; establish as org standard for all test documentation
ServerGuard struct pattern is effective for preventing orphaned processes; add to project patterns documentation for future integration tests
Dynamic port allocation + 200ms timing buffer pattern should be codified to prevent future timing race issues

recommendations.recommendation: Add Formatting Check to CI Pre-commit
recommendations.rationale: Formatting failures blocked make check completion; catching cargo fmt issues earlier saves iteration cycles
Structured result.md enables automated metrics extraction for dashboards and SLO tracking
